ddls:
CREATE TABLE "size_conversion" (
  "conversion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size conversion */,
  "cm_size" TEXT /* Shoe size in centimeters */,
  "inch_size" TEXT /* Shoe size in inches */,
  "eu_size" INTEGER /* Shoe size in European (EU) system */,
  "uk_size" TEXT /* Shoe size in United Kingdom (UK) system */,
  "us_size" TEXT /* Shoe size in United States (US) system */,
  "size_type" TEXT /* Type of size (e.g., men's, women's, kids') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conversion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* ID of the brand the product belongs to */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the product belongs to */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the product */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material of the product */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the product */,
  "width" TEXT /* Width of the product */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the product */,
  "depth" TEXT /* Depth of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "country_of_origin" TEXT /* Country where the brand is based */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the brand */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the brand */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the brand */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "conversion_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size conversion */,
  "stock_level" INTEGER /* Current stock level of the product in that size */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the stock level was last updated */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* ID of the warehouse where the product is stored */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_conversion_id FOREIGN KEY ("conversion_id") REFERENCES size_conversion ("conversion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_warehouse_id FOREIGN KEY ("warehouse_id") REFERENCES warehouses ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "warehouses" (
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each warehouse */,
  "warehouse_name" TEXT /* Name of the warehouse */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the warehouse */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the warehouse is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the warehouse is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the warehouse */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the warehouse is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Contact person at the supplier */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the supplier */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for the supplier */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was placed */,
  "total_amount" TEXT /* Total amount of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "shipping_address_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shipping address */,
  "billing_address_id" INTEGER /* ID of the billing address */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_shipping_address_id FOREIGN KEY ("shipping_address_id") REFERENCES addresses ("address_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_billing_address_id FOREIGN KEY ("billing_address_id") REFERENCES addresses ("address_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "conversion_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size conversion */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the product at the time of order */,
  "discount_amount" TEXT /* Discount amount applied to the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_conversion_id FOREIGN KEY ("conversion_id") REFERENCES size_conversion ("conversion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the customer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the customer */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the customer */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the customer */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the customer */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the customer registered */,
  "loyalty_program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loyalty program the customer is enrolled in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_loyalty_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("loyalty_program_id") REFERENCES loyalty_programs ("loyalty_program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "addresses" (
  "address_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each address */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who owns the address */,
  "address_type" TEXT /* Type of address (e.g., shipping, billing) */,
  "address_line1" TEXT /* First line of the address */,
  "address_line2" TEXT /* Second line of the address */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the address */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the address */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the address */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the address */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("address_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_addresses_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loyalty_programs" (
  "loyalty_program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loyalty program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the loyalty program */,
  "program_description" TEXT /* Description of the loyalty program */,
  "points_per_dollar" TEXT /* Number of points earned per dollar spent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("loyalty_program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_methods" (
  "payment_method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment method */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who owns the payment method */,
  "payment_type" TEXT /* Type of payment method (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  "payment_token" TEXT /* Token representing the payment method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payment_methods_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the user role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "user_permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the permission */,
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user role associated with the permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "permission_description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("user_role_id")
)
